ddls:
CREATE TABLE "database_engines" (
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each database engine */,
  "engine_name" TEXT /* Name of the database engine */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the database engine */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the database engine */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the database engine (e.g., relational, NoSQL) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration parameter */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database engine the parameter belongs to */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration parameter */,
  "param_description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the configuration parameter */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the configuration parameter */,
  "min_value" INTEGER /* Minimum allowed value of the configuration parameter */,
  "max_value" INTEGER /* Maximum allowed value of the configuration parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_parameters_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("engine_id") REFERENCES database_engines ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "database_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each database configuration */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who uploaded the configuration */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database engine the configuration belongs to */,
  "config_file" TEXT /* File path to the configuration file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration was uploaded */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_database_configs_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("engine_id") REFERENCES database_engines ("engine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_database_configs_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance data point */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database configuration the data belongs to */,
  "throughput" INTEGER /* Throughput of the database */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "block_size" INTEGER /* Block size for data storage */,
  "cache_index_and_filter_blocks" INTEGER /* Cache index and filter blocks for improved performance */,
  "compaction_readahead_size" INTEGER /* Compaction readahead size for improved performance */,
  "compression_type" TEXT /* Compression type used */,
  "level0_file_num_compaction_trigger" INTEGER /* Level 0 file number compaction trigger */,
  "level0_slowdown_writes_trigger" INTEGER /* Level 0 slowdown writes trigger */,
  "level0_stop_writes_trigger" INTEGER /* Level 0 stop writes trigger */,
  "max_background_compactions" INTEGER /* Maximum number of background compactions */,
  "max_background_flushes" INTEGER /* Maximum number of background flushes */,
  "max_bytes_for_level_multiplier" INTEGER /* Maximum bytes for level multiplier */,
  "max_write_buffer_number" INTEGER /* Maximum write buffer number */,
  "min_write_buffer_number_to_merge" INTEGER /* Minimum write buffer number to merge */,
  "write_buffer_size" INTEGER /* Write buffer size */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage of the database */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage of the database */,
  "disk_usage" REAL /* Disk usage of the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES database_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "knowledge_base" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each knowledge base article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database engine the article belongs to */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration parameter the article is related to */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the article */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_knowledge_base_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES config_parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_knowledge_base_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("engine_id") REFERENCES database_engines ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_forum" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community forum post */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who made the post */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the post was made */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the post */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_forum_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_login" (
  "login_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user login */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who owns the login */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the login */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role associated with the login */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("login_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_login_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_login_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "rec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database configuration the recommendation belongs to */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration parameter the recommendation is for */,
  "recommended_value" TEXT /* Recommended value for the configuration parameter */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the recommendation */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES database_configs ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES config_parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the machine learning model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the machine learning model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the machine learning model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "pred_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model that made the prediction */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database configuration the prediction belongs to */,
  "predicted_value" TEXT /* Predicted value for the database performance */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pred_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES database_configs ("config_id")
)
